[[Fleet Commander/Legends|Fleet Commander]] '''Flankar''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officer who was stationed on [[Anaxes/Legends|Anaxes]]. He was intimidated by [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]] and an army of [[Tyber Zann]]'s [[Zann Consortium/Legends|troops]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' {{1st}}
